channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Opposite 10 Cambridge Row SE18 7JL, 29th June
item.description:
House hold waste bags dumped and ripped on the road between the cars. Broken wardrobe in pieces in the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Key recovery, 29th June
item.description:
I dropped my car key down the drain in front of my house
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cambridge Row SE18 7JL, 29th June
item.description:
Pavements and parking spots have been fly tipped. Broken chairs , sofas, shoe storage boxes dumped all over the pavement on the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Row, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown shrubs needing pruning and sucker-saplings, 29th June
item.description:
Hello, please prune back the over grown mature shrubs that are located along the pavement on Salter Road between houses #36 and #51. These shrubs are located between the brick walls and the pavement. Secondly, there are tall sucker-saplings that need to be severed, they are growing in this same space and alongside their parent trees. Please see attached photos. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped furniture, 29th June
item.description:
The area has been clear for four days but overnight someone has dumped a bed base, a mattress and some bedding, as well as an oven shelf.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 226, Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass by bus stop at parkside parade northend road erith, 29th June
item.description:
Has been there two days now
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northend Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes and rubbish, 29th June
item.description:
Torn bags of clothes and rubbish in front of council owned garages.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smithies Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left hand lane signs crooked/displaced, 29th June
item.description:
One of the left hand lane signs at the junction of Venner Road and Newlands Park is leaning at an angle; the other has been moved to the pavement nearby.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 29th June
item.description:
The bins on Clapton Terrace have not been emptied. Both general waste and recycle are piled high around the bins and near the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox (skeletal), 29th June
item.description:
Found a dead fox in my garden this morning. Put in 2 black bin bags and left in the front of the skip close to the main road. Please pick it up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Park, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road works, 29th June
item.description:
The road is coned off causing major congestion. It is not showing on the relevant map and no one is working there. I could not see a licence plate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction on highway, 29th June
item.description:
Problem was previously reported. Owner of 105 Coniston Road continues to puts cones on the street outside their house despite having a driveway and not owning the street. Been going on for many months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coniston Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road diversion sign left, 29th June
item.description:
The diversion down grange walk ended some weeks ago and the sign has been left on the pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grange Walk, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree on verge, 29th June
item.description:
Dead tree on verge, planted by council outside our property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St George's Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waterloo passage, 29th June
item.description:
The sign is damaged

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London

item.title: Broken litter bin, 29th June
item.description:
Broken litter bin and dumped rubbish nearby

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Way, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Left turn traffic light crashed into, 29th June
item.description:
Facing wrong direction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farringdon Street, City of London

item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: On the street, 29th June
item.description:
Please can this be removed. It is causing flies and attracting environment.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Compayne Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
